name: export_as_example_design
short_description: Export current design as a static example design
full_help:
export_as_example_design

Description: 
Export current design as a static example design

Syntax: 
export_as_example_design  -vlnv <arg> [-no_ip_version] [-force] [-quiet]
                          [-verbose] -directory <arg>

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  -vlnv             VLNV of the example design to be generated
  [-no_ip_version]  Flag to not include the IP version as part of the IP VLNV
                    in create_bd_cell commands.
  [-force]          create a directory if it does not exist
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution
  -directory        Destination directory in which example design needs to be
                    generated

Categories: 
IPIntegrator
